headline: Air Products to Speak at Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference on May 27
summary: Air Products' (NYSE: APD) Chief Executive Officer Eduardo Menezes and Chief Financial Officer Melissa Schaeffer will participate in a fireside chat at the Bernstein 42nd Annual Strategic Decisions Conference on Wednesday, May 27, 2026 at 9:00 a.m. USET.

headline: Hitchhiker Commodities: The Supply Chains Nobody Owns
summary: A hidden set of byproduct materials powers modern life, and their supply depends entirely on decisions made for other industries. Read more here.
